testcase.name: Comment-Agent Response Validation › TDD-1: User comment triggers agent response visible in UI
Comment-Agent Response Validation › TDD-2: Agent responses update in real-time via WebSocket
Comment-Agent Response Validation › TDD-3: Agent comment has correct author metadata
Comment-Agent Response Validation › TDD-4: No infinite loop in comment processing
Comment-Agent Response Validation › TDD-5: Multiple users commenting triggers separate agent responses
Comment-Agent Response Validation › TDD-6: Agent response contains relevant content
